name: Activeport Group Ltd
analysis: ATV's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.0280, stop A$0.0139, target A$0.0330 (0.35:1) — then trail it.
